abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: You Take the Wheel
abilities.text: Once per turn. After this model resolves the Walk action, it may discard a card to declare the Interact action, ignoring engagement. This Interact action may target a marker with enemies in base contact with it.

actions.name: View of the Endless
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy models within 1" of the target gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Onward
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Walk action.

triggers.name: Celestial Navigation
triggers.text: Look at the top three cards of this model's fate deck. This model may reveal a (t) from the revealed cards to move up to 3", then put the cards back in any order.

triggers.name: Rocket Man
triggers.text: When resolving the generated action, instead of moving normally, this model may place itself anywhere within 5" of its current location.
